creator: moggie@elasticmind.net
text:
Approved, thank you. I'll try to get them properly updated over the 
festive season.


On 18/12/2011 16:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of irc/ircd-ratbox,
>
> Please note that PR ports/163433 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/163433
>
